objective: Fix the GitHub owner-facing user center so mail status, template preview, candidate pool, review/action/asset/ROI status, evidence links, and the three baseline files are human-readable, Chinese-first, and not misleading.

root_cause.bad_timestamp: Previous owner-center Markdown pages used hand-written timestamps. A manually typed value can drift from the real edit time and can become a future timestamp.
root_cause.duplicate_index: README.md and a second user-center index page duplicated owner-facing routing information, which created drift risk and low ROI.
root_cause.learning_snapshot_gap_wording: The review/action/ROI page described the issue as GitHub not being able to display daily values. The correct requirement is to display the fields and evidence on GitHub, then wait for a real daily run snapshot to write real values.
root_cause.baseline_readability: The three baseline files contained too much machine-field language for the owner-readable Chinese baseline.
root_cause.fix: Generate concrete user-center timestamps, keep README.md as the only owner-facing index, use clickable evidence links, display review/action/ROI fields with 待今日运行快照写入 when real daily values are absent, and rewrite the three baseline files as Chinese-readable baselines.

mail_status_page: kept 今日已发送 / 总应发送 as 2 / 待确认 without unsupported denominator examples
kept direct links to the user-readable template preview and audit evidence
kept candidate wording as 299 candidate-pool records with 11 currently displayed candidates
kept the Code column in the displayed candidate table
learning_snapshot_page: replaced the old GitHub cannot display wording with concrete GitHub fields and evidence links
added 今日快照 fields for due review, next 7 days, overdue, completed, action windows, assets, and verifiable ROI
marked missing real daily values as 待今日运行快照写入 instead of inventing numbers
added arxiv-daily-push/scripts/update_user_center_learning_snapshot.py so real S2PJT02/S2PJT03 report JSON can sync values into the GitHub user-center page
linked every evidence position with Markdown links
single_user_center_index: deleted the duplicate user-center index page
merged its useful owner-entry, baseline-file, and evidence-map content into arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/README.md
timestamp_guard: kept concrete user-center timestamps and future-time checks
agent_rules: updated arxiv-daily-push/AGENTS.md to require README.md as the only user-center index
required clickable Markdown evidence links in owner-facing pages
required 待今日运行快照写入 for missing real daily review/action/ROI values
synced_owner_pages: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/复习行动与收益.md
arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/关键结论与用户决策.md

mail_status_contract.primary_destination: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/邮件发送与队列状态.md
mail_status_contract.template_preview_destination: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/邮件模板预览.md
mail_status_contract.expected_count_rule: The denominator must come from the formal daily send plan or schedule configuration. It must not be guessed or hand-written without evidence.
mail_status_contract.candidate_pool_rule: The candidate pool includes generated reports, generated mail previews, and still-pending candidate records. A displayed sample must not be described as the whole queue.

learning_snapshot_contract.primary_destination: arxiv-daily-push/用户中心/复习行动与收益.md
learning_snapshot_contract.real_daily_value_rule: If the current daily report is absent, show the expected field and write 待今日运行快照写入. Do not use fixture counts, old reports, chat content, or guesses as real daily values.
required_fields: 可验证实际收益 / 转化
learning_snapshot_contract.evidence_rule: Evidence positions must be clickable Markdown links in GitHub-rendered Markdown.

validation_plan: Scan owner-center and baseline files for removed misleading phrases and duplicate index references
